conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid prepared according to <title xlink:type="simple" render="italic">Describing Archives: A Content Standard (DACS)</title>.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 18, 2018 at 23:07
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.

did.abstract: Collection consists of black and white glass lantern slides of Gothic architecture.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code) or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Gothic Architecture Lantern Slide Collection, Arts Library, Yale University

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of black and white glass lantern slides of Gothic architecture.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by country. Further arranged by city or other location, building type or name.

did.unittitle: Left door (North), Confessor or St. Fermin
Left door (North, Portal of the Virgin)
North Transept door (Portal of the Virgin)
South Transept door (Portal of S. Etienne)

p.emph: Xx for Gdansk see Architecture Gothic Gerney Danzig

did.unittitle: Hospital of the Knights of S. John
